phases.name: Consideration
phases.start_when: Week 2 or when watch page traffic grows

phases.name: Conversion — Tickets
phases.start_when: Countdown under 30 days or tickets live

meta.optimization: Landing page views or Lead form

ads.name: AD_HB_Waitlist_FoundingFan
ads.headline: Join the Waitlist
ads.meta_primary: The world's first live AI hologram boxing experience is launching. Drop your email for early access, ticket alerts, and exclusive drops.
ads.tiktok_text: Hologram boxing launching soon. Waitlist = first in the tent. Tap to join.

ads.name: AD_HB_Waitlist_WhatIs
ads.headline: What Is Hologram Boxing?
ads.meta_primary: What is hologram boxing? Walk into an inflatable tent, AR on, watch Wave hologram boxers in a glowing square. Spectator only — fight night energy that hits different. Join the waitlist.
ads.tiktok_text: What is hologram boxing? Tent + AR + AI fighters. You watch — Wave fights. Tap to join.
ads.hook: What is hologram boxing? Real talk — you don't fight.

ads.headline: What Is Hologram Boxing?
ads.meta_primary: Walk into an inflatable tent, AR on, watch Wave hologram boxers in a glowing square. Spectator only — fight night energy that hits different.
ads.tiktok_text: What is hologram boxing? Tent + AR + AI fighters. You watch — Wave fights.

ads.headline: Inside the Hologram Tent
ads.meta_primary: Dark quilted walls, rolling fog, glowing fight square. Wave wireframe boxers spar while the crowd watches in VR goggles. Lowkey secret club energy.
ads.tiktok_text: Whole fight lives in an inflatable tent. Glowing square. Wireframe boxers. Fog.

ads.headline: Hologram Boxing Is Here
ads.meta_primary: Inflatable tent, AR headsets, real prize money, HB 002 loading. Future fight night vibes.
ads.tiktok_text: Creators AI Hologram Boxing — tent, AR, AI fighters, real prizes.

ads.headline: All Ages Welcome
ads.meta_primary: Family-friendly hologram boxing — AR goggles, AI fighters, no contact for guests. Groups, birthdays, date night.
ads.tiktok_text: All ages hologram boxing night. AR spectators only.

ads.headline: Meet the Wave Roster
ads.meta_primary: Wave — one AI hologram champion, six color variants. Gold vs Fire main event on Hologram Boxing 002. Pick your side.
ads.tiktok_text: Wave Gold. Wave Fire. Wave Blue. Six variants one roster.

ads.headline: How It Works
ads.meta_primary: 1) Buy with Me vs Me crypto 2) Choose headset or attendee POV 3) Watch in the tent 4) Win if your fighter wins.
ads.tiktok_text: Buy ticket → pick view → AR headset → win prizes. Four steps.

ads.headline: AR Headset Experience
ads.meta_primary: Put on AR gear inside the tent — Wave hologram boxers come alive in the glowing square. Headset POV from 200 MVM.
ads.tiktok_text: AR headset on → hologram fight in your face. 200 MVM.

ads.headline: Watch Free on Kick & Twitch
ads.meta_primary: Every hologram fight streams live free on @creatorsai. Tent tickets = full AR experience in Me vs Me crypto. Stream now, pull up later.
ads.tiktok_text: Free live stream on Kick & Twitch @creatorsai.

ads.headline: Hologram Boxing 001
ads.meta_primary: The inaugural card — 6 Wave variants, $5K pool, Wave Gold champion. Watch recap free — HB 002 tickets open now.
ads.tiktok_text: HB 001 recap on site. 002 tickets loading.

ads.headline: HB 002 — Book Now
ads.meta_primary: Bigger tent. $10,000 prize pool. 8 fights. Gold vs Fire main event. Tickets unlock at countdown — secure your spot in Me vs Me crypto.
ads.tiktok_text: HB 002. $10K pool. Gold vs Fire. Limited dates. Tap to book.

ads.headline: Book with Me vs Me Crypto
ads.meta_primary: On-site tent tickets: Headset POV 200 MVM · Attendee POV 350 MVM. Me vs Me crypto only. Pick fight + fighter on Book page.
ads.tiktok_text: 200 MVM headset POV. 350 MVM attendee POV. Me vs Me crypto.

ads.headline: $10K Prize Pool
ads.meta_primary: Hologram Boxing 002 — $10,000 fighter pool. Buy a ticket, pick your Wave fighter. If they win, you're entered in the fan prize pool.
ads.tiktok_text: $10K on the line. Pick your fighter when you buy.

ads.headline: Choose Your POV
ads.meta_primary: Headset POV (200 MVM) — your AR goggles, your angle. Attendee POV (350 MVM) — ringside guest live feed. Both spectator-only.
ads.tiktok_text: Headset POV vs Attendee POV — same tent, different angle.

ab_hooks: Wait — hologram boxing is real? No cap.
HB 002 tickets unlock at countdown zero — don't sleep.
$10K pool — pick the winner, win with them.
You're front row through AR goggles. Literally.
You don't fight. You watch. All ages.
